title: AICraftingTable
description: An AI-powered crafting table that creates unique custom new items in game.
body:
**AI Crafting Table** is a mod that adds a special crafting table powered by AI. Instead of fixed recipes, it generates **brand new items** based on how you arrange materials in the grid.



## Feature

*   🧠 **AI-Powered Crafting** – Place any combination of items and let the AI generate a unique result.
*   🎨 **Custom Items** – Automatically creates new item names, textures, and functions.
*   🧪 **Shape Matters** – The layout of ingredients affects the result — try different patterns!
*   🗃️ **Saved Results** – View and reuse items you’ve crafted before.


## Usage

*   In the UI of the AI Crafting Table, click the arrow button after placing your ingredients. Several options will be generated — you can click one to start generating an item.
*   You can try multiple times or change your layout to get the result you want.
*   If the texture is broken or looks bad, you can click the re-generate button near the result slot to regenerate the item.
*   You can remove item with command /aicraft removeItem id


## Requirements

*   **Minecraft**: 1.19.2
*   **Mod Loader**: Forge
*   **Dependencies**: None
